sections.sectionTitle: Mikaiah in Ahab leh Jehoshafat a Kizawhna ding Genkhol

verses.text: Kum thum sung Syria leh Israel gal kido loin om uh hi
Ahih hangin a kum thumna kumin Israel kumpi Ahab kiangah Judah kumpi Jehoshafat va paisuk hi
Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in a nasemte kiangah, “Ramothgilead eima-a' hi a, eite pauloin omin Syria kumpipa' khutsung panin i lakkhiat lohna thu na thei uh hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Ramothgilead-ah galsim dingin kei nong zui ding hiam?” a ci hi. Jehoshafat in Israel kumpipa kiangah, “Kei-a kipan ka mite leh ka sakolte nangma-a' ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in Israel kumpipa kiangah, “ Topa thu dong masa in,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in kamsangte mihing za li bang khawmin amaute tungah, “Ramothgilead a sim dingin ka kuan ding hiam, ahih kei leh ka thuak ding hiam,” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Kuanto in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kumpipa' khutsungah hong pia ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Jehoshafat in, “Thu i dot theih ding Topa' kamsang adang khat beek om nawnlo ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in Jehoshafat kiangah, “ Topa thu i dot theihna ding, Imlah' tapa Mikaiah a kici mi khat omlai hi. Ahih hangin amah in kei' thu a hoih gen ngeiloin a sia gen den ahih manin amah ka mudah hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Jehoshafat in, “Kumpipa in tua bangin ci kei in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in ulian khat samin, “Manlangin Imlah' tapa Mikaiah hong paipih in,” a ci hi
Samaria kulhpi lutna ancilna-ah Israel kumpipa leh Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat a kumpi tokhom tung uhah tu-in kumpi puan tawh kizemin om uh a, kamsang khempeuh in amau' mai-ah thu gen uh hi
Tua ciangin Khenaanah' tapa Zedekiah in ama-a' dingin sik kite bawl a, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Amaute na zawh matengin hihte tawh Syria mite na nawt ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Kamsang khempeuh in zong tua bangmahin genin, “Ramothgilead-ah kuanto in la gualzo in; Topa in kumpipa' khutsungah hong pia ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Mikaiah a sam dingin a pai kamtaipa in ama kiangah, “Thu kikhatin kamsangte' thugen pen kumpipa-a' dingin a hoihlam ahi hi. Amaute bangin nang zong gen in la, a hoihlamin gen in,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Mikaiah in, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin, Topa in kei tungah hong gen thu ka gen ding hi,” a ci hi

Kumpipa kiangah amah a tun' ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Mikaiah aw, Ramothgilead-ah galsim dingin i kuan ding hiam, ahih kei leh i thuak ding hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in dawngin, “Kuanto in la va gualzo ve. Topa in kumpipa' khutsungah hong pia ding hi ve'n,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “ Topa' min tawh thudang genloin thuman bek kei tungah nong genna ding bangzah vei hong thuhilh ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah in, “Tuucing a neilo tuute bangin mualte tungah Israel mi khempeuh a kithehthang ka mu hi. Topa in, ‘Hihte in makai neilo hi; amaute lungnuam takin a inn ciat uhah ciah hen,’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Amah in kei' thu a hoih genloin a sia gen ding hi, nang kiangah hong ci khin hilo ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, “Tua ahih ciangin Topa' thu ngai in: Topa a kumpi tokhom tungah tu-in, ama taklam leh a veilamah vantung mihonpi a ding ka mu hi
Tua ciangin Topa in, ‘Amah kuanto-in Ramothgilead-ah a va sihna dingin kua in Ahab va zol ding hiam?’ ci hi. Khat in thu khat genin adang khat in thudang khat gen hi
Tua ciangin kha khat hong madawkin Topa' mai-ah ding a, ‘Keimah in amah ka va zol ding hi,’ ci hi

Topa in ama kiangah, ‘Bang lam tawh zol ding na hi hiam?’ a ci hi. Amah in, ‘Keimah paikhia-in, ama kamsangte khempeuh sungah a zuau kha ka va hi ding hi,’ ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, ‘Nangmah in amah a va zol ding na hi a, nangmah in na zo ding hi; paikhia in la tua bangin va hih in,’ ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in en in, Topa in hih na kamsangte khempeuh' sungah zuaugen kha khat koih khin hi. Topa in nang tawh kisai-in a sia gen khin hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Khenaanah' tapa Zedekiah a nai-ah hong pai-in Mikaiah a paang bengin, “Nang' tungah thu a gen dingin Topa' kha in cikin kei hong nusia-in nang kiang hong tung ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, “En in, nangmah a bu dingin inndei nungah na pai ni ciangin na thei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in, “Mikaiah man un la, khuapisung a ukpa Amon leh kumpipa' tapa Joash kiangah paipih kik un
Tua ciangin, ‘Kumpipa in hih bangin ci hi: “Hih mipa thong sungah koih un la, lungnuamin kei kong ciahkik matengin an leh tui tawmno cik bek tawh vak un,” ci hi,’ va ci un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Mikaiah in, “Lungnuam takin nong ciahkik leh Topa in kei' tung tawnin thu hong genlo ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in, “A kuamah peuh in hih ka thugen za un,” cithuah lai hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel kumpipa leh Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat, Ramothgilead-ah kuanto uh hi

Tua ciangin Israel kumpipa in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Kei ka meel seelin gal sungah kong kuan ding a, ahih hangin nangmah in na kumpi puante nong silh ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel kumpipa in a meel seelin gal sungah kuan hi
Tu-in Syria kumpipa in ama leeng a uk mi sawmthumlenihte thu pia-in, “A neu ahi a, a lian tawh ahi zongin kido loin, Israel kumpipa bek tawh na kido ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Leeng a ukte in Jehoshafat a muh uh ciangin amaute in, “Israel kumpipa hi taktak hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah a do dingin amaute kihei uh hi; tua ciangin Jehoshafat awngkhia hi
Israel kumpipa ahih lohna leeng a ukte in a theih uh ciangin amah a delhna panun amaute nungkik uh hi

Ahih hangin mi khat in a thal mawk lot a, a galhiam awmdal thep kikalah lutin Israel kumpipa kha hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in a leeng hawlpa kiangah, “Kei liam ka hih manin hong kihei in la, gal sung panin hong puakhia in,” a ci hi
Tua ni-in galkidona lian a, nitaka a sih dong Syria-te' lam maingatin a leeng sungah Israel kumpipa kingamin a om hi. A liamma panin a si luangte leeng taw lamah luangkhia hi
Nitum pawlin galkapte lakah kikona khat hong om a, “Mi khempeuh ama khuapi-ah, mi khempeuh ama gamah!” kici hi
Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa si a, Samaria-ah kipaipih a, amaute in Samaria-ah kumpipa vui uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Samaria bual gei-ah a leeng sil uh a, Topa in a gensa thu tawh kizui-in uite in a sisan liak tumin numei paktatte tua sungah kisil uh hi
Tu-in Ahab' gamtatna a omlaite, a hih khempeuh, ama lamsa saiha inn, leh ama lam khuapi khempeuh, Israel Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua bangin Ahab si a, ama tangin a tapa Ahaziah in uk hi.
Israel kumpi Ahab' kum lina kumin Asa' tapa Jehoshafat in Judah gamah uk ding kipan hi
Gam uk dingin a kipatin Jehoshafat kum sawmthumlenga pha a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnihlenga sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Azubah hi a, Shilhi' tanu ahi hi
Amah in a pa Asa' khekhap tawn a, tua lampi panin pialloin, Topa' muhna-ah a manin gamta hi. Ahi zongin mualtunga biaknate kilakhia lo a, mite in tuate tungah biakna pia lai-in paknamtui hal uh hi
Jehoshafat in Israel kumpipa tawh zong kilemna a bawl hi
Tu-in Jehoshafat' gamtatna a omlaite, amah in a lah a thahatna, leh amah in a galdona, Judah Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
A pa Asa' hun lai-in a omlai pasal paktat pawlte amah in gamsung panin beisak hi
Edom-ah kumpi omlo a, Judah kumpipa' khutnuai-a a huhpa khat in uk hi
Jehoshafat in kham zongin Ofir-ah a pai dingin Tarshish teembawte bawl hi. Ahih hangin Eziongeber-ah teembawte sia ahih manin amaute pailo uh hi
Tua ciangin Ahab' tapa Ahaziah in Jehoshafat kiangah, “Teembawte sungah nangma nasemte tawh keima nasemte paikhawm sak in,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Jehoshafat utlo hi
Tua ciangin Jehoshafat si a, David khuapi Jerusalem-ah a pate tawh kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Jehoram in a uk hi.
Judah kumpipa Jehoshafat' kum sawmlesagihna kumin Ahab' tapa Ahaziah in Samaria panin Israel tungah uk ding kipan a, amah in Israel tungah kum nih sung uk hi
Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta a, ama nu, leh ama pa, leh Israel a khialsak Jeroboam' khekhap mah tawn hi
Amah in Baal na semin bia a, a pa mah bangin a hihna khempeuhah Israel Pasian, Topa hehsak hi.
